data.title: Small Molecule API Market to Reach USD 202.53 Billion by 2036, Driven by Generic Drug Demand and Expanding Oncology Pipeline
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, it has been reported on April 28, 2026, that the global small molecule Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient (API) market is currently experiencing a period of steady growth. Future Market Insights analysis has indicated a positive trend, with key factors such as growing demand for generic drugs and a rise in oncology pipeline activity driving this expansion. The market is expected to continue its upward trajectory propelled by these factors.

data.title: HOK and ROSSETTI Join Forces to Create Expanded Global Sports, Recreation and Entertainment Design Practice
data.description: In New York, HOK has recently acquired ROSSETTI, an architecture firm based in Detroit known for its expertise in sports venue design and renovation projects. This merger enhances HOK's standing as a top global design practice for sports, recreation, and entertainment venues. The combined entity will be known as HOK + ROSSETTI during the integration phase. ROSSETTI's team, led by Matt Rossetti, FAIA, LEED AP, will remain in Detroit, allowing HOK to establish a physical presence in a market it has been keen on.

data.title: Canaan and Tether team up on cooling systems: Canaan secures a big Tether order for mining hardware.
data.description: Canaan has recently sealed a fresh deal with Tether for purchasing modular mining hardware. This collaboration comes as Tether, the stablecoin issuer, ventures into the realm of integrated, data center-like Bitcoin infrastructure. The specifics of the order size or monetary value have not been disclosed publicly.

data.title: $4.4m USDT rewards in May 2026 for BitMart's 30-day Trade-to-Feed contest, celebrating its 8th anniversary & new EAT listing.
data.description: BitMart is celebrating its 8th anniversary with a 30-day Trade-to-Feed competition and the strategic listing of EAT, the inaugural cause coin.

data.title: Aave and Compound introduce plan to rectify $290M Kelp DAO hack fallout; aim to restore full backing for rsETH tokens.
data.description: Top DeFi protocols have detailed technical measures to eliminate bad debt and ensure full backing for exploited rsETH tokens. Key steps have been specified to address the issue, highlighting the commitment to rectifying the problem and safeguarding the integrity of the tokens.

data.title: Gmail dot alias trick and Robinhood setup flaws exploited in phishing scam targeting users to expose credentials.
data.description: Cybercriminals took advantage of a feature in Gmail's system where periods in email addresses are interchangeable and manipulated flaws in Robinhood's account creation process. They used this scheme to send deceptive phishing emails that appeared legitimate to users, persuading them to divulge their login details. The scam involved tricking individuals into thinking the emails were verified, creating a false sense of security. This intricate scheme highlights the need for vigilance in online interactions.

data.title: Forrester Launches Forrester AI Agent For Microsoft 365 Copilot To Deliver Research-Driven Insights Into Leaders’ Workflows
data.description: Forrester, a popular market research company listed as Nasdaq: FORR, has introduced the Forrester AI (previously known as Izola) agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot. This innovative tool allows clients to access Forrester's trusted research and advice securely within their regular workflows. Importantly, this feature comes at no extra charge for current license holders. This launch is following Forrester's integration with Microsoft Teams, showcasing their commitment to transforming how clients interact with research and advisory organizations. Embracing the speed and efficiency of AI technology.

data.title: Middle River Power Marks 10 Years of Growth, Execution, and Innovation in the Energy Transition
data.description: Middle River Power (MRP) is celebrating its 10-year milestone in Chicago as it looks back on a decade of substantial progress characterized by disciplined expansion, efficient operations, and a firm dedication to providing dependable, cost-effective, and progressively eco-friendly electricity. Since its establishment, MRP has achieved significant success in upholding its commitment to delivering reliable energy services to customers.

data.title: Ortega® Declares May 6 "Seis de Mayo," a New National Holiday to Keep the Fiesta Going
data.description: A well-known Mexican food brand introduces its inaugural "Seis de Mayo" festivities in Chicago, featuring taco truck pop-ups and the debut of their new brand mascot, Brotega. data.title: Didlake CEO Paul Gravley Appointed East Region Representative on NCSE Executive Committee
data.description: In Manassas, Virginia, on April 28, 2026, Didlake, a nonprofit organization providing rehabilitative services and participating in the AbilityOne® Program, revealed that Chief Executive Officer Paul Gravley will serve as the East Region Representative for a one-year term. This appointment marks Gravley's new role within the organization.

data.title: Paradigm Health Announces Collaboration with the FDA to Transform Regulatory Review of Clinical Trial Data
data.description: A major research partnership has been announced today between Paradigm Health and the U.S., aiming to expedite FDA review through two trials. Using Paradigm Health's advanced technology platform, the initiative is set to revolutionize the medical field. The collaboration will take place in Washington and Columbus, Ohio. Stay tuned for updates on this groundbreaking project slated for April 28, 2026.

data.title: Kaseya Unveils the First Agentic IT Management Platform - Turning Data into Autonomous Action
data.description: Kaseya leverages Kaseya Intelligence to enhance its platform, integrating a comprehensive real-world IT dataset with a precise execution layer for accuracy. On April 28, 2026, in Miami, Kaseya, a prominent worldwide provider of AI-driven IT management and cybersecurity solutions, announced this development.

data.title: Pieno Žvaigždės AB, Financial statements for the year 2025
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Pieno Žvaigždės AB shareholders' meeting approved the financial statements, management report, confirmation of management, audit opinion, and sustainability report for the year 2025. This marks a significant step as the company moves forward with the latest figures and plans.

data.title: Canary Speech Introduces Free Voice-Based Check-In for Consumers to Help Identify Early Signs of Mental Health Decline
data.description: Canary Speech, a prominent company specializing in vocal biomarker technology, has introduced a 45-second voice analysis tool in Provo, Utah. This tool aims to detect signs of stress, anxiety, and depression, providing an innovative method for early identification during Mental Health Awareness Month in April 2026. This technology addresses gaps in early detection and offers a quick assessment option.
